title: Smoked Norwegian Fish Wrap
description: A simple and delicious wrap filled with smoked Norwegian salmon, mixed greens, and tangy cream cheese. Perfect for a light and refreshing meal.
instructions: Lay the tortilla wrap flat on a clean surface.
Arrange the smoked salmon along the center of the wrap.
Top the salmon with mixed greens, cream cheese, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a tight cylinder.
Slice the wrap in half and serve immediately.
